description: 30 clear TCS-style enterprise IT helpdesk scenarios — final mixed bag (Set TC)

cases.title: Cannot Login to Ultimatix Employee Portal
cases.description: Cannot login to Ultimatix employee self-service portal — password rejected after recent reset. Need access to submit timesheet before payroll cutoff today.

cases.title: Client Site GlobalProtect VPN Connection Failed
cases.description: GlobalProtect VPN to client Citibank environment fails with 'Gateway unreachable' from home office. Required for daily standup and code commit access.

cases.title: Fake HR Payroll Phishing Email Reported
cases.description: Security incident: multiple associates received fake HR payroll email with malicious link. Three employees clicked link before warning sent. Need SecOps investigation.

cases.title: Company Laptop Battery Not Charging Past 15 Percent
cases.description: TCS-issued Dell Latitude battery stuck at 15% and not charging. Power adapter connected, LED shows charging but percentage never increases. Need replacement for client demo.

cases.title: SAP S4HANA Fiori App Transaction Timeout
cases.description: SAP S/4HANA Fiori purchase requisition app times out after 60 seconds on submit. Other Fiori tiles load fine. Blocking month-end procurement for client project.

cases.title: SQL Server Blocking Queries on Client Reporting DB
cases.description: SQL Server client reporting database showing severe blocking chains. Dashboard queries timing out after 5 minutes. Blocking session SPID 284 holding locks since 7 AM.

cases.title: New Joiner Laptop Email and AD Account Setup
cases.description: New associate joining Pune DC on Monday — need laptop image, Active Directory account, corporate email, and Ultimatix ID provisioned per onboarding checklist HR-2291.

cases.title: Floor 12 Printer Toner Empty Cannot Print
cases.description: HP printer on Floor 12 Pune campus shows 'Replace toner cartridge' and will not print client deliverable documents. Red toner light blinking.

cases.title: Microsoft Teams Screen Share Frozen for Client
cases.description: Microsoft Teams screen share freezes during client review call — attendees see static image. Camera and audio work. Teams version 24127, Windows 11.

cases.title: Firewall Whitelist Request for Client API Endpoint
cases.description: Need corporate firewall rule to allow outbound HTTPS from dev subnet to client API endpoint api.clientbank.com port 443. Change request CR-8842 approved by client IT.

cases.title: Ransomware Detected on Project Shared Folder
cases.description: Security incident: files on project shared drive P:\ClientABC encrypted with .lockbit extension. CrowdStrike alert on file server. Five team members cannot access deliverables.

cases.title: Oracle RMAN Backup Failed Archive Log Missing
cases.description: Oracle RMAN nightly backup failed with ORA-00257 archiver error. Archive log destination full on client DB server orcl-prod-01. Client SLA backup window missed.

cases.title: Lost Phone Need MFA Authenticator Re-Enrollment
cases.description: Lost personal phone with Microsoft Authenticator MFA app. Cannot login to corporate email or VPN until new device enrolled. Manager verified identity via HR.

cases.title: Campus Wi-Fi Extremely Slow in Block C
cases.description: Corporate Wi-Fi in Pune campus Block C extremely slow — under 2 Mbps and high latency. Wired ethernet desk port in same cubicle works at full speed.

cases.title: Visual Studio Enterprise License Expired
cases.description: Visual Studio Enterprise shows 'License expired' on developer workstation. Cannot build client .NET solution. License was valid last week before machine reimage.

cases.title: USB-C Dock Ethernet Port Not Detected
cases.description: Lenovo USB-C dock ethernet port not detected on laptop. Wi-Fi through dock works but wired LAN shows 'Unidentified network'. Need wired connection for client VPN policy.

cases.title: AWS Secret Key Committed to Client Git Repo
cases.description: Security incident: developer accidentally committed AWS secret access key to client GitHub repository in pull request. Repo is private but 12 team members have access. Need immediate rotation.

cases.title: MongoDB Replica Set Primary Election Loop
cases.description: MongoDB replica set stuck in primary election loop on client staging cluster. Application health checks failing. Secondary nodes show RECOVERING state.

cases.title: ServiceNow Catalog Item Page Blank White Screen
cases.description: ServiceNow IT service catalog page loads blank white screen when requesting software install. Other ServiceNow modules like incident list work fine in same browser.

cases.title: Employee Smart Badge Denied at Main Gate Turnstile
cases.description: Employee smart badge denied at Pune campus main gate turnstile with red LED. Badge works for cafeteria but not building entry since badge reprint yesterday.

cases.title: MPLS Circuit Down Client Data Center Link
cases.description: MPLS WAN circuit to client data center completely down since 6 AM. All offshore team lost connectivity to client production monitoring tools and ticketing system.

cases.title: Citrix VDI Desktop Black Screen After Login
cases.description: Citrix VDI virtual desktop shows black screen after successful login. Mouse cursor visible but no desktop icons or taskbar. Local laptop works fine for other apps.

cases.title: Laptop Keyboard Multiple Keys Not Responding
cases.description: Company laptop keyboard — keys E, R, T, and Space bar not responding. External USB keyboard works. Need repair or replacement before client presentation tomorrow.

cases.title: Snowflake Warehouse Auto-Suspended Credit Limit
cases.description: Snowflake data warehouse WH_CLIENT_ANALYTICS auto-suspended — credit quota exhausted. Client Tableau dashboards and ETL pipelines failing since midnight run.

cases.title: SharePoint Project Site Access Denied for Team
cases.description: Entire project team getting 'Access Denied' on client SharePoint project site. Site worked yesterday. Need contributor access restored for 8 associates.

cases.title: Brute Force Attack on Corporate VPN Gateway
cases.description: Security incident: VPN gateway logs show 80,000 failed login attempts from foreign IP range in last 2 hours. Possible credential stuffing attack on GlobalProtect portal.

cases.title: NetApp Snapshot Restore for Deleted Client Data
cases.description: Client project data accidentally deleted from NetApp NAS volume. Need snapshot restore from last night 11 PM snapshot before client audit on Friday.

cases.title: Webex Client Call Audio One-Way for Client Meeting
cases.description: Cisco Webex desktop client — client can hear me but I cannot hear them on daily scrum call. Webex browser version works with two-way audio on same machine.

cases.title: Offboard Resigned Associate Revoke All Access
cases.description: Associate resigned effective today — need immediate offboarding: disable AD account, revoke Ultimatix, O365, VPN, GitHub, Jira, and client VPN credentials per HR ticket.

cases.title: Campus Wing B DHCP Pool Exhausted No IP
cases.description: Users in Campus Wing B report 'No IP address' on corporate LAN since morning. DHCP scope 10.45.0.0/24 shows zero available leases. Affects 200+ associates.
